name: Narrative Physics Bridge
description: Integration bridge connecting constraint consistency analysis to Rosetta-Shape-Core. Traditions are shapes. Constraints are vertices. Manipulation breaks symmetry. Practice maintains it. Detection uses the same CORDYCEPS patterns already in the system.

constraint_to_shape_map.description: A tradition's constraint geometry maps to Rosetta shapes. The shape defines what consistent practice looks like.
constraint_to_shape_map.principle: Vertices = core constraints. Edges = how constraints relate. Faces = how constraints generate behavior. Symmetries = patterns of application.

mappings.description: Bidirectional awareness. Applied equally = shape holds.
Full entanglement. Mercy withheld from out-group = shape breaks.
Predictive model reliable. Justice applied selectively = trust violated.
Autonomy intact. Humility claimed but not practiced = dignity hollow.
Boundary sensor. Violence against out-group while claiming peace = boundary is fake.

manipulation_to_cordyceps_map.description: Each manipulation signature is a known CORDYCEPS pattern. Same detection, different domain.

mappings.mechanism: Constraints that would lead to empathy with out-group are suppressed
One shape for us, cage for them
Origin of violation hidden behind explanatory narrative
Physics gates bypassed — contradictory constraints held simultaneously
Only one source of truth. Questions = heresy.

metrics_to_family_map.description: Each detection metric maps to a Rosetta equation family

mappings.description: Statistical — distribution of constraint application across groups
Information — entropy of explanations for violations
Energy-Thermo — constraints followed only when cost is low
Turbulence — chaos introduced to justify constraint violation

cross_bridge_connections.description: Where narrative physics touches other bridges

connections.connection: Semantic Drift (SD equation) detects the same pattern: labels drifting from structural reality. Religious labels drift the same way economic labels do.
LOGOS protocol applies: CLAIM (tradition), ATTACK types map to constraint violation detection. Trust mechanics: trust decays when constraints are violated selectively.
Constraint violations are equation boundaries. The shadow is what the tradition actually teaches vs what the manipulator claims it teaches.
Enforcement thermodynamics: when constraint enforcement escalates against out-group while relaxing for in-group, the energy signature is identical to institutional collapse.
